name: NIST AI RMF: GOVERN — Accountability Assigned
description: Clear roles, responsibilities and lines of accountability for the AI system are established.
rationale: NIST AI RMF GOVERN 2: accountability structures are in place so the appropriate teams and individuals are empowered, responsible, and trained.

examples.fails: the required risk-management step is absent

source: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0), NIST AI 100-1, 26 Jan 2023 — voluntary framework organised around GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE. https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework
